reviews.review_description: I did not expect to have such fun. Firstly, they have such confidence that they give 25 minutes free play. That got me hooked and I now bought the game (and that at a very reasonable price) for what you get, it's well worth it. It looks great with the augmented reality and you have to think a bit on your feet to be successful. I recommend this, even for my first time VR playing friends they will flip even just playing the first level. So I like it. PS. It does play more fun without controllers but hand gesture only.
